description: Creates a mesh that is a cylinder with rounded ends instead of flat ends.

fields.Radius: Determines the roundness of the mesh.
fields.Height: Determines how tall the mesh is.
fields.Rings: Determines the smoothness of the top & bottom of the mesh.
fields.UVScale: The inverse of the size the material should appear on the surface as.

usage: Add this mesh to a mesh renderer component along with a material to view it
